intro_section.description: I build modern, functional, and user-centric interfaces.

about_me_section.description: Frontend Developer with expert knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, specializing in responsive landing pages and high-conversion HTML emails. I create modern, interactive user interfaces using React and TypeScript with a focus on UI/UX and pixel-perfect design. With hands-on experience in HubSpot, Mailchimp, and WordPress, I bridge the gap between marketing needs and technical execution. My background with Java and SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL) provides a deep understanding of the full development lifecycle. I deliver clean code, meet tight deadlines, and am fluent in English.

stack_section.title: My Stack
stack_section.description: Tools and technologies I use to bring creative projects to life.

experience_section.title: Experience & Education
experience_section.subtitle: My professional journey in development and the academic foundation that helps me build quality products.
experience_section.web_description: Specialized in building responsive email campaigns and landing pages from scratch based on custom designs. Ensured pixel-perfect layouts and consistent rendering across all major email clients and browsers.
experience_section.unv_description: Focusing on IT project management, software architecture, and advanced web development principles.

portfolio_section.title: Portfolio
portfolio_section.subtitle: A selection of my recent works

landing_wp.description: Developed and deployed a custom WordPress landing page. Configured the admin panel for easy content management and integrated contact form plugins.

landing_hb.description: Created a high-performance HubSpot landing page. Optimized content editing via custom modules and integrated HubSpot CRM forms for lead generation.

landing_shopify.description: Handled frontend development for Shopify store pages. Configured theme sections to allow the owner to manage content through the Shopify editor.

landing_gh.description: Development and setup of a HubSpot page. Exposed key layout blocks to the admin panel for flexible editing and integrated platform-specific forms.

email_hb.description: Pixel-perfect HTML email development for HubSpot. Conducted rigorous testing across Android, iOS, Gmail, Outlook, and Samsung Mail.

email_klaviyo.description: Developed a custom template for Klaviyo. Verified responsive behavior across smartphones, tablets, and desktops, including specialized testing for iOS and Gmail.

email_customer.description: Built a responsive email for Customer.io. Tested for cross-platform stability across all major devices and email service providers.

email_mailchimp.description: Custom email template for Mailchimp. Executed pixel-perfect coding and ensured consistent rendering in Outlook, Gmail, and Apple Mail.

email_active.description: Email development and QA for Active Campaign. Tested rendering across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices (Samsung, iPhone).

project_word_breaker.title: Interactive Demo
project_word_breaker.subtitle: Project
project_word_breaker.description: This project demonstrates an interactive interface for low-level text data manipulation. The core concept involves transforming static text strings into a set of independent objects that users can interact with in a free-form space.

not_found_page.title: Page not found
not_found_page.description: Sorry, we couldn't find what you were looking for. Maybe the link is outdated or there's an error in the address. But don't worry, the way back is open!

footer.quote_text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
